LanguageData.FCP_VertibirdCrash.description: A crashed vertibird with survivors under heavy attack. Multiple enemy waves are converging on the location. You must defend the survivors through all waves until a rescue shuttle can extract them.
LanguageData.FCP_VertibirdCrash.label: vertibird crash site
LanguageData.FCP_Site_CaravanRescue.description: A trading caravan under attack by raiders.
LanguageData.FCP_Site_CaravanRescue.label: ambushed caravan
LanguageData.FCP_Site_Facility.label: facility
LanguageData.FCP_Site_PawnRescue.description: A prisoner being held by enemies.
LanguageData.FCP_Site_PawnRescue.label: prisoner camp
LanguageData.FCP_Site_SettlementRaidInProgress.label: settlement
LanguageData.FCP_Site_SupplyRun.description: A scavenging site with supplies to recover.
LanguageData.FCP_Site_SupplyRun.label: supply cache
LanguageData.FCP_Site_TechCache.label: pre-war bunker
